parsed.production_notes: The video features real people in a natural setting with realistic lighting and shadows. The hands holding the phone show natural movements and imperfections, and the phone screen reflects light naturally.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, light complexion. She has long, straight dark hair and dark eyes. Her facial features are soft and she has a bright smile.
characters.wardrobe: She is wearing a simple black top.

characters.appearance: Older adult female, medium build, light complexion. She has light brown, wavy hair pulled back. She wears wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: She is wearing a light pink and purple striped long-sleeve shirt.
characters.demeanor: Focused, attentive, and happy when she succeeds.

scenes.setting: A cozy living room during the evening. Props include a coffee table, a lit candle, a potted plant, and a white armchair. The color palette is warm with earthy tones.
scenes.camera: Over-the-shoulder / POV with a picture-in-picture inset.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two hands with red nail polish hold a smartphone in the foreground. The background is a softly blurred living room setting. A coffee table with a lit candle and a potted plant is visible. A light-colored armchair sits in the background. The lighting is warm and natural. The camera angle is from the perspective of the person holding the phone.
Character A is framed in a close-up shot. She is smiling and appears to be speaking. The background behind her is a plain, light-colored wall. The lighting is bright and even.

scenes.visual_description: The shot is composed from a first-person perspective, looking down at hands holding a smartphone. In the top right corner, there is a picture-in-picture video feed of Character A. The main view occasionally shifts to show the side profile of Character B. The background is a cozy, blurred living room. Text overlays and captions appear throughout the scene. The phone screen displays an app interface.

Character A says: Okay try it again, try it again, try quarterly.
Character B says: Quarterly.
[sound effect: chime]
Character A says: Nice! You got it right.
